reviews.name: OpenHands
key_obligations: Include MIT copyright notice in core usage
Enterprise/ directory uses PolyForm Free Trial 1.0.0 — 30-day trial only, requires commercial license beyond
Do not distribute enterprise features without license
reviews.recent_changes: Enterprise license updated Apr 14 2026 (commit 4cdf88d). Main LICENSE clarified dual-license structure Sep 2 2025.

reviews.name: Activepieces
key_obligations: Enterprise features (packages/ee/, packages/server/api/src/app/ee) require commercial license
reviews.recent_changes: LICENSE last updated Feb 15 2024. No license type changes since inception — always MIT + commercial dual license.

reviews.name: PostHog
reviews.commercial_use: Allowed for self-hosted; competing SaaS restricted
key_obligations: Custom license — not OSI-approved open source
Third-party components retain their original licenses
Enterprise features (ee/) use separate PostHog Enterprise License
Restrictions on offering competing hosted services
reviews.recent_changes: Custom license is a departure from standard OSI licenses. Historical shifts between license models observed.

reviews.name: bolt.diy
reviews.commercial_use: Allowed (MIT), but WebContainer API requires commercial license for production for-profit use
key_obligations: WebContainers (StackBlitz tech) — free for prototypes/POCs, commercial license for production
No additional copyleft or network-use obligations in core codebase
reviews.recent_changes: Originally by Cole Medin, now community-driven. Active development with many contributors.
